query:
SELECT l.id,
                       l.title,
                       l.description,
                       l.video_id,
                       ll.order_index,
                       (lp.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS "completed!"
                FROM lecture_links ll
                    JOIN lectures l ON l.id = ll.lecture_id
                    LEFT JOIN lecture_progress lp
                        ON lp.lecture_id = l.id AND lp.user_id = $2
                WHERE ll.topic_id = $1
                ORDER BY ll.order_index
